description: Loading animation displays a plane traveling between Brisbane and London while search results are being retrieved.
frame_description: A loading screen with a plane icon moving along a dotted path between Brisbane and London.

description: The flight search results page loads, displaying various airline options and prices.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the loading animation to the flight search results page.

description: User pauses to review the flight search results, including airline options like Qatar Airways, Virgin Australia, and British Airways.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of flight options with prices and airline logos.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'FASTEST' sorting option in the flight results.
